title: Okay, this unleashed my agent
summary: An overview video comparing AI agent tools and architectures, including autoresearch and autoagent capabilities, Claude Code's 3-layer memory system, and self-evolving mechanisms in Hermes and Openclaw. The video highlights practical agent frameworks for building autonomous systems.
